criteria.description: Governance/steps/gates resolution keys off meta.json mission_type; never inferred from template_set, never defaults to software-dev.
criteria.evidence: WP02 canonicalizer + WP04 leak fix; tests/charter/test_mission_type_key.py + WP12 integration; grep-0 software-dev-default on the governance path.
criteria.verified_by: reviewer-renata (per-WP approvals) + WP12 enforcement suite; orchestrator accept
criteria.notes: Verified via approved WP review(s) + WP12 enforcement suite.

criteria.description: A documentation/research/plan mission resolves only its own doctrine; no software-dev-only doctrine unless explicitly selected.
